name: Esteban Hernández Valenzuela
about: I am a video game programming student and a creative developer. I enjoy creating interactive experiences and systems that feel fluid and fun. I also enjoy working on programming projects unrelated to video games, and I am always eager to learn new technologies.
pong.name: Little game
experience.job1.title: Supervision Intern — SAE Institute Mexico
experience.job1.description1: Development of an equipment loan application in Unity, connecting to a Google Sheets database to retrieve loanable equipment and upload requests.
experience.job1.description2: Development of the game A World of Friendship for the 2026 Route of Friendship exhibition in Mexico City, using Unity for Android.
project.title: Projects
project.intro: Here you can see some of the projects I've worked on :)
game.MundoDeAmistad.title: Un mundo de amistad
game.MundoDeAmistad.description: Android game developer and designer using Unity for the Ruta de la Amistad exhibition in Mexico City.
